== Notes for [[Item:Q106518|Q106518]] ==

From ''Banu Abd Al-Dar'' Tribe (Part of ''Quraysh'' Tribe).
* Martyred at Battle of Uhud, Medina.
* Wafaat: 3rd Shawwaal 3 AH (21st March 625 AD)

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mus%60ab_ibn_%60Umair

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000017840970868

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
